name: Coach's World Championship BBQ Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place two whole chickens in a gallon zip lock bag with 24 ounces of Wishbone Italian Salad Dressing. Seal the bag and refrigerate overnight.
2. Remove the chickens from the bag and pat them dry. Sprinkle the Head Country BBQ spice over the chicken inside and out.
3. Place the chicken in the smoker and cook for 5 hours or until done. Brush on a lemon mop every hour (see recipe).
4. If grilling, brush on more sauce more often. At the four-hour mark, brush the BBQ sauce over the chicken, repeating every 30 minutes until cooked through.
5. This works well with chicken halves or breasts. When grilling pieces, leave the skin on to prevent drying out.
6. Add BBQ sauce during the last 10 to 15 minutes of grilling to avoid burning if the sauce contains tomatoes or sugar.
7. Do not marinate pieces for more than 3 to 4 hours.
